raw.message: The Best DBZ Battle Experience is Here

hook.summary: Showcase of new character cards with a focus on Broly.
hook.visual_action: A central Broly card is displayed over a collage of various Dragon Ball characters.
hook.voiceover_transcript: New fighters arrive in Dragon Ball Z Dokkan Battle. Play now!

scene_flow: Central Broly card appears over a background grid of character art.
Text overlays cycle through 'NEW', 'DRAGON', and 'DOKKAN' above the 'PLAY NOW!' button.
The background grid remains static while the central card and logo are highlighted.
Final call to action with the game title and 'PLAY NOW!' button.
audience_proxy: Male Dragon Ball fans aged 18-35 who enjoy gacha and card collection games.
